title: Short title
doc_html:
CHAPTER 8-A.  PROFESSIONAL GEOSCIENTISTS

§711.1.  Short title

This Chapter may be cited as the "Louisiana Professional Geoscience Practice Act".

Acts 2010, No. 974, §1, eff. Jan. 1, 2011.
